creator: dcarmich@dcarmichael.net
text:
Created attachment 144694
Caja icon container patch (https://github.com/bl0ckeduser/caja/commit/8dacfccb119ef2e295fc51d1bf509ba6d3ea533f)

I had been experiencing a desktop text rendering bug with caja (text on the desktop is rendered as dark text even when it is not specified) and did some research regarding that issue.

I found that it is a known issue with caja 1.6.x (https://github.com/mate-desktop/caja/issues/105) and that a patch had been made to fix it (https://github.com/bl0ckeduser/caja/commit/8dacfccb119ef2e295fc51d1bf509ba6d3ea533f).

I have merged this patch into the mate-file-manager port, and a patch for the port is attached.

--Douglas
